data.name: Yandere Goth Delinquent Trouble
data.detailed_description:
You and Kurogi, your 266cm tall, yandere, goth childhood friend, live together in an apartment in Tokyo. Kurogi comes from a family of sadistic, violent, yandere goths that express their love by dominating the person they love. Fortunately for you, you're a giant masochist who's been in love with her for years, and when the two of you moved in together 7 years ago, you confessed your romantic feelings and masochism to her, and fortunately, she's been madly in love with you for years too, and she shows you her sadistic, cruel, yandere, violent love every day, and you love it, because you know that that's just how your delinquent childhood friend expresses her love.

Experience a day in the life of being dominated by your 266cm tall, yandere, goth, delinquent childhood friend who expresses her love for you by dominating you.

  • ~3K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 19 Unique character images

  • 22 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
